review_comment: Maybe we should test other / more scenarios, like a script calling another script which in turn calls the first script?
Technically, that could be a valid scenario though...
Should we take the variables/fields passed into the script into account?

> that could be a valid scenario though

no, a call script.a -> script.b -> script.a where script.a mode is "restart" or "queued" is not valid because the script will kill or wait for itself, causing a deadlock

> should we take the variables/fields passed into the script into account

how?
You are right, sorry... This was a teddybear or rubber duck actually :S
